title: Contracts Core
description: Deterministic contract test coverage mapped from Foundry suites to spec IDs.

tests.title: HealthRecordRegistry Foundry suite passes under deterministic forge execution.
tests.description: This test validates the primary registry contract behavior through the existing Foundry test suite. It catches storage and policy enforcement regressions at the contract layer.
steps: Run forge test --json in contracts package
tests.successCriteria: HealthRecordRegistry test suite passes and mapper writes deterministic result evidence.

tests.title: Policy engine and ACE policy contracts compile and execute referenced tests without errors.
tests.description: This test protects policy-related contract wiring by asserting the forge run does not contain compile/runtime failures for ACE contracts. It guards against accidental policy interface drift.
preconditions: forge cache is clean or reproducible
contracts/src/ace remains in sync with interfaces
steps: Inspect output for ace policy test failures or compilation errors
Persist failure details to contract evidence log if any
tests.successCriteria: No ACE policy compile or runtime failures are present in the forge output.
